---
title: "Nathaniel Warren"
---

## Nathaniel Warren

**Dates:** (Southampton 1804/5-1866 Winchester)

### Description

Winchester bookseller

### Biography

His business was in High Street, Winchester (where it continues today, 2009, as a stationer).  He was the recipient of payments from 1854, 1855,1856, 1857;  he may have been the printer of <i>The Little Duke</i>. [1851, 61 census, register of deaths]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
